aggregate_spdx: Apache-2.0 AND BSD-2-Clause AND BSD-3-Clause AND CC0-1.0 AND ISC AND MIT AND Unlicense AND WTFPL

capability_impact.runtime_downloads: blocked by Fedora patch; download APIs may use reviewed local cache only and otherwise return Error::Download
capability_impact.source_build: all included parser C/C++ sources compile at build time; .o files are excluded

excluded_parsers.reason: misidentified Cargo metadata names a different repository
NOASSERTION: exact Cargo MIT and package ISC declarations conflict
MIT declaration only: no pinned primary text
MIT declaration only: no pinned primary text
misidentified Cargo metadata names a different grammar repository
MIT declaration only: no pinned primary text
MIT declaration only: no primary text or release linkage
NOASSERTION: no governing declaration or license text at the pin
source/package identity mismatch: hjson repository declares tree-sitter-jsonc
MIT declaration only: no pinned primary text
MIT declarations only: published release points to a different commit

inclusion_rule: Pinned primary license text, or specifically recorded exact supplemental evidence with matching source identity. Declaration-only, conflicting, misidentified, and NOASSERTION records are excluded.

licenses.supplemental_rationale: exact pinned LICENCE text and matching manifests
pinned manifest plus preceding historical LICENSE text
exact pinned LICENCE text and matching Cargo manifest
exact package declaration plus npm release with matching gitHead
